title: Abacus AI Just Dropped AI SuperComputer With Claude And Gemini
summary: Abacus AI launched AI SuperComputer, a cloud platform where AI agents can build, deploy, and run software in a real Ubuntu environment with databases, storage, terminal access, GitHub, AWS, and HTTPS deployment. The platform bridges the gap between code generation and live application deployment, enabling agents to move beyond text generation to full software execution.
